United States.summary: Heat Wave Worsens, Excessive Heat Warning Issued in Multiple States (United States) - A severe heat wave has brought temperatures to record-high levels in several states, prompting a health alert from the National Weather Service.

Supreme Court Ruling on Abortion Sparks Concerns (United States) - The Supreme Court's decision to strike down Roe v. Wade has sparked widespread protests and fears of increased access restrictions to reproductive healthcare.

Ransomware Attack Targets US Transportation Systems (United States) - A significant ransomware attack has compromised the data of several US transportation companies, raising concerns about cyber security and the potential for disruptions to crucial services.

South Korea.summary: Demonstrators in South Korea have rallied against President Yoon Suk-yeol, calling for his impeachment over alleged misconduct, including mishandling the economy and mishandling North Korea tensions.
South Korea has launched a new naval drill near a disputed group of islets in the East Sea that are also claimed by North Korea and Japan.
The South Korean parliament has rejected a request by opposition lawmakers to hold an inquiry into a recent fire at a key naval base.

Japan.title: Japan's Defense Ministry warns of N Korea missile threat
Japan.summary: Japan's Defense Ministry said it detected a North Korean ballistic missile launch, with the missile landing in Japan's exclusive economic zone.

Japan.title: Tsunami warning issued in Japan after 7.3 magnitude earthquake
Japan.summary: A 7.3 magnitude earthquake struck off the coast of Japan, prompting a tsunami warning for several regions.

Japan.title: North Korea fires intercontinental ballistic missile over Japan
Japan.summary: North Korea fired an intercontinental ballistic missile (ICBM) over Japan, prompting Japan and South Korea to issue public warning systems.
